title: Dimension mismatch when querying with gemini-embedding-001
symptom: When querying the Supabase database using the gemini-embedding-001 model, n8n throws an error indicating a dimension mismatch between 768 and 3072.
root_cause: The query embedding generated by the gemini-embedding-001 model has 3072 dimensions, while the Supabase Vector Store node is expecting 768 dimensions, leading to a conflict during the query process.
fix_steps: Add an Embeddings Google Gemini node to generate the query embedding using the gemini-embedding-001 model.
Use an HTTP Request node to query Supabase directly with the generated embedding.
agent_instruction: Generate the query embedding with the Google Gemini node and query Supabase using an HTTP Request node.
